title: Set up Vercel AI SDK in a Next.js project
summary: Full Vercel AI SDK v4 integration — provider setup, streaming Route Handler, useChat hook, and tool use patterns for Next.js App Router.
declaration: I will integrate the Vercel AI SDK v4 into this Next.js project to enable streaming AI responses. This SDK is provider-agnostic — it works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, and others through a unified interface. Tell me which AI provider you want to use (OpenAI is the default), and whether you need a simple chat UI or function/tool calling.
